errorText: Could not communicate with the RENDA backend database. Please check if the backend is running.

mode.title: Operation Mode
mode.hint: Choose how RENDA should organize your media files.
mode.libraryHint: Sort, rename, and group movies and TV shows into a structured target library folder.
mode.inplaceHint: Clean up filenames directly where they are, without moving or changing directory structure.
mode.warningHint: Warning: In the absence of a Target Folder, sorting takes place within the source folder, which may result in a duplicated folder structure and disrupt torrent clients.

advanced.title: Advanced Options
advanced.minVideoSizeMbHint: Videos smaller than this size will be categorized as extras and skipped from matching.
advanced.minVideoDurationMinutesHint: Videos shorter than this duration will be skipped from primary media matching.

advancedLanguage.title: Language Settings
advancedLanguage.metadataFollowsUi: Metadata should follow the App Language
advancedLanguage.metadataFollowsUiHint: If checked, RENDA will fetch movie/episode titles and descriptions matching your App Language (e.g. English details from TMDB).
advancedLanguage.metadataLanguageHint: Choose which language to query TMDB and OMDb metadata in.
advancedLanguage.fallbackMetadataLanguageHint: Choose which language to query TMDB and OMDb metadata in if the primary language is not available.
advancedLanguage.targetFollowsUi: Target Language should follow the App Language
advancedLanguage.targetFollowsUiHint: If checked, the final renamed files and folders on your disk will be formatted in your App Language.
advancedLanguage.targetLanguageHint: Choose which language to rename physical files and folders in.

theme.title: Theme Options
theme.label: Interface Theme
theme.hint: Select your preferred application color theme.

closeBehavior.title: Close Behavior
closeBehavior.label: App Close Action
closeBehavior.hint: Configure what happens when you close the main application window.

language.title: Language
language.hint: RENDA uses English by default. More languages are coming soon!

content.title: Content Options
content.includeAdultHint: If enabled, TMDB searches and matching will include adult/NSFW movie, TV, and actor titles.
content.autoHydrateInactivePeopleHint: If enabled, TMDB cast and crew members marked as inactive will still be fully fetched and resolved.

organization.title: Media Organization
organization.presetHint: Choose how RENDA should organize your movie and TV series files on your disk.
organization.customToggleHint: Turn this on to configure advanced custom folder layouts, directory structures, and file naming templates.

presets.plexDesc: Structured library with standard naming conventions, dedicated folders, and subtitles grouped under Extras/.
presets.jellyfinDesc: Optimized for Jellyfin. Similar to Plex, but keeps subtitle and media extra files flat next to your movie/episode files.
presets.kodiDesc: Optimized for Kodi. Uses dot separators in filenames (e.g. The.Matrix.1999) and keeps extra files flat next to media.
presets.minimalDesc: A bare-minimum structure. Renames files directly next to each other in root directories without nested season or movie folders.

organization.previewHint: Real-time structure mapping of your target directory layout and naming templates.

fileNaming.title: File Naming Rules
fileNaming.casingHint: Choose the letter case format for the renamed files.
fileNaming.separatorHint: Select the character used to separate words in filenames.
fileNaming.movieTemplateHint: Template format for movie files. Available tags: {title}, {year}, {resolution}, {edition}, {custom}.
fileNaming.episodeTemplateHint: Template format for TV episode files. Available tags: {series_title}, {season}, {episode}, {episode_title}, {resolution}, {custom}.
fileNaming.customTagHint: Specify a custom text value to replace the {custom} tag in your naming templates.
fileNaming.videoExtsHint: Comma-separated list of recognized video extensions (e.g. .mkv, .mp4, .avi). These extensions are shared between primary media and bonus/extra videos.

folderStructure.title: Folder Structure & Naming
folderStructure.orgEnabledHint: If disabled, files will only be renamed in-place without moving or grouping them into subfolders.
folderStructure.moveToLibrary: Move Organized Files to Target Library
folderStructure.moveToLibraryHint: If enabled, files will be moved into the Target Library folder (defined in General settings). If disabled, organization happens inside the scan source folder.
folderStructure.moveToLibraryDisabledHint: Requires a Target Folder. Please configure one in General settings to enable library sorting.
folderStructure.sortByTypeHint: Separate movies, TV shows, and adult content into different root-level folders (e.g. Movies/ and TV Shows/).
folderStructure.removeEmptyHint: Delete empty folders in the scan source path after successfully moving the media files.
folderStructure.createMovieSubdirHint: Create a separate folder for each movie.
folderStructure.createShowDirHint: Create a separate folder for each TV series.
folderStructure.createEpisodeDirHint: Create a separate folder for each episode file (usually not recommended unless keeping extra files per episode).

collections.title: Collections Settings
collections.createCollectionDirHint: If enabled, movies belonging to a collection (e.g. Marvel Cinematic Universe) will be grouped into their own collection subfolder.
collections.collectionModeHint: Choose when to group movies into collection subfolders.

collectionModeOptions.threshold: Group only when you own at least X movies from the collection
collectionModeOptions.complete_only: Group only when all movies in the collection are matched

collections.collectionThresholdHint: Only group into a collection folder if you own at least this many movies from that collection in your library.

extras.title: Extras Handling
extras.extrasEnabledHint: If enabled, RENDA will scan, categorize, and organize extra files (subtitles, trailers, images, metadata) along with your main media files.
extras.folderModeHint: Choose how extra files are stored in the movie folder.
extras.folderModeDisabledHint: Requires a Target Folder. Extras are forced to be Flat next to media when organizing in-place.
extras.inplaceInfo: For in-place renaming, subtitles and other extras are renamed directly next to the media file.

api.title: API Keys
api.tmdbStep1Start: Create or log in to your account at
api.tmdbStep2Start: Go to your Account Settings and select
api.tmdbStep4Mid: into the first field and the long
api.omdbStep2End: tier (1,000 daily requests) or choose a donor option.
api.omdbStep3: Submit your email. You will receive an email with your key.
api.omdbStep4End: Click the activation link in your email, then copy the key into the OMDb field above.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export your current RENDA settings to a JSON file or import settings from a previously saved backup.
backup.importSuccess: Settings loaded! Review and click Save Changes to apply.
backup.importError: Failed to import settings. Invalid JSON file.

validation.vlcNotExist: VLC executable path does not exist.
validation.vlcNotFile: VLC path must point to a file.
validation.mpcNotExist: MPC-HC executable path does not exist.
validation.mpcNotFile: MPC-HC path must point to a file.
validation.scanDirNotFolder: Scan Folder must point to a folder.
validation.libraryDirNotFolder: Target Folder must point to a folder.
validation.foldersCannotBeSame: Scan Folder and Target Folder cannot be the same.
validation.Default Scan Folder must point to a fold: Scan Folder must point to a folder.
validation.Target Library Folder must point to a fo: Target Folder must point to a folder.
validation.Default Scan Folder and Target Library F: Scan Folder and Target Folder cannot be the same.

dangerZone.title: Database Maintenance
dangerZone.desc: Wiping the database will clear all media libraries, matched items, custom lists, and playback logs. Your user settings and API key configurations will be preserved, and cache.db will not be touched. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirm: Are you sure you want to wipe the entire database? This will clear all media libraries, matches, lists, and playback logs. Your user settings and API cache will be preserved. This cannot be undone.
